zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：窄幅整理下的偏弱震荡结构
zh.content:
以太坊/美元整体窄幅偏弱整理，价格在1570上方徘徊，短线动能不足，趋势震荡下行。

技术指标方面，MACD维持负值且动能柱收缩，显示空头略占优势。价格低于20日均线1579，反映短期均线压制明显，反弹持续性不足。

支撑位关注1570一线及日内低点1574附近，若跌破或进一步下探1550区域。上方阻力集中在1580至1583区间，突破需放量确认。

交易策略上建议以区间思路为主，未有效突破1583前谨慎追多，可在1570附近低吸反弹，跌破支撑则考虑顺势减仓或短空操作。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum against the US dollar is currently consolidating in a very tight intraday range, with price action hovering near 1574 after a mild 24-hour decline. The structure suggests a short-term cooling phase following prior upward attempts, but without strong breakdown momentum. Price sitting just under the 20-day SMA indicates a slightly bearish bias, with bulls struggling to reclaim short-term control and sustain movement above the mid-range equilibrium zone.

From a trend perspective, ETH/USD is essentially range-bound with a mild downward tilt. The inability to hold above the SMA(20) at 1579.58 signals weakening bullish momentum, while repeated tests near the 1574–1575 area show buyers are still active but cautious. The compressed high-low range (1582.74 to 1574.14) reinforces indecision. Momentum conditions remain soft, and MACD at -4.50109 confirms bearish pressure is present, though not strong enough yet to trigger an impulsive sell-off.

Key technical levels are clearly defined due to the tight consolidation. Immediate support is located at 1574, followed by a more meaningful floor near 1570, where buyers may attempt to defend structure. On the upside, initial resistance sits at 1579.58 aligned with the SMA(20), followed by 1582.74, which marks the recent intraday high. A break above this range would be needed to signal recovery toward the 1590–1600 zone.

Trading conditions favor a cautious, range-trading approach rather than breakout positioning. Short-term traders may consider buying near support with tight risk controls, while resistance zones offer potential short entries if rejection signals appear. Until MACD flattens or price reclaims the SMA(20) convincingly, momentum remains fragile and upside continuation is not yet confirmed.
